name: shopify-pp-mcp
description: Operate a Shopify store from the terminal with local sync, analytics, and bulk exports.

shopify_access_token.title: SHOPIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN
shopify_access_token.description: Sets SHOPIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN for the Shopify MCP server. Get a credential from https://shopify.dev/docs/apps/build/authentication-authorization/access-tokens.

shopify_api_version.title: SHOPIFY_API_VERSION
shopify_api_version.description: Sets SHOPIFY_API_VERSION for the endpoint template variable {api_version}.

shopify_shop.title: SHOPIFY_SHOP
shopify_shop.description: Sets SHOPIFY_SHOP for the endpoint template variable {shop}.
